get.description: Returns all modalities ordered by modality_id ascending.
Returns all orientations ordered by name ascending.
Returns all non-deprecated property types ordered by property_type_id ascending.
Returns rent periods enabled for the provided property type, ordered by period_id ascending.
Returns clauses available for the provided modality. When q is present, the endpoint performs a filtered search. Results are paginated.
Returns a paginated list of contracts. Admins and Agents see all, Owners see only their own. Supports filtering by type, status, date range, and text search.

parameters.description: Search by property title or client name
parameters.name: search

post.description: Generates a legal contract in PDF format based on real estate transaction data and stores it in R2. Only the property owner can invoke this endpoint. Supports multiple contracts per transaction.

400.description: Invalid input or logical date error

500.description: Internal error in PDF generation or storage

get.description: Returns the full details of a contract, including the PDF URL.
Returns cities for the selected state. Results are paginated.
Returns all available countries ordered by name.
Returns all states for the selected country ordered by name.
Returns payments visible to the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Numeric ID of the authenticated user
parameters.name: X-User-ID

parameters.description: Minimum due date in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_from

parameters.description: Maximum due date in YYYY-MM-DD format
parameters.name: date_to

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Register a payment for a contract with simulation logic (terminates in 0000 for failure).

get.description: Returns one payment detail.

parameters.description: Numeric ID of the authenticated user
parameters.name: X-User-ID

patch.description: Manually transition a 'Pending' payment (like OXXO) to 'Completed'.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of property cards. Supports filtering by search query, status, property type, modality, location (country, state, city), price range, and minimum bedrooms. Price selection logic prioritizes sale price, then the best current rent price (Monthly > Annual > Weekly > Daily).

parameters.description: Search term (matches title, address, city, state, country)
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter by status IDs (Available=2 by default for clients)
parameters.name: status_id

post.description: Registers a property and all related records in a single database transaction. The backend generates the property UUID and stores subtype, location, pricing, services, and clauses atomically.

get.description: Get available 1-hour slots for a property on a specific date

Returns property base data, subtype, and location for the given UUID. When full=true, the response also includes consolidated prices, price history, photos, services, and clauses. Deleted properties are treated as not found.

parameters.description: Include prices, history, photos, services, and clauses
parameters.name: full

delete.description: Soft deletes a property by UUID. The request must include confirm=true and a valid changed_by_user_id. The operation deletes linked photo objects from storage before applying database updates. Only properties with available status can be deleted.

patch.description: Update property base data, subtype and location. Only editable fields are allowed.

get.description: Returns the clauses linked to a property by UUID. When the property has no clauses, the response contains an empty data array.

put.description: Replaces all clauses linked to a property by UUID. When the payload omits clauses or sends an empty array, all linked clauses are removed.

get.description: Returns the chronological history of status changes for a specific property. Administrators can view any property history, while Agents or Clients can only view history of properties they own.

400.description: Invalid UUID or missing required headers

403.description: Forbidden: You are not authorized to view this history

get.description: Returns the photo metadata linked to a property by UUID ordered by sort_order ascending. When the property has no photos, the response contains an empty data array.

put.description: Replaces the stored metadata of the photos linked to a property by UUID. Exactly one photo must be marked as cover when the payload contains photos. When the payload omits photos or sends an empty array, all linked photos are removed.

get.description: Returns the active prices of a property by UUID. Sale price and rent prices include only currently active records (is_current=true). If no active sale price exists, sale_price is null. If no active rent prices exist, rent_prices is an empty array.

put.description: Updates property prices by UUID. Only processes prices in the payload; unmodified prices remain unchanged. When the amount of a price changes, a new price record is created and the old one is marked as inactive. Amounts must be greater than 0. Currency is not editable.

get.description: Returns the service IDs linked to a property by UUID. When the property has no services, the response contains an empty service_ids array.

put.description: Replaces all services linked to a property by UUID. When the payload omits service_ids or sends an empty array, all linked services are removed.

get.description: Returns popular active services when q is empty, or matching active services when q is provided. Results include metadata and honor the optional limit parameter.

post.description: Uploads a property photo to object storage and registers metadata. Max size is 5MB and allowed types are image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp.

get.description: List visits according to user role (Admin, Agent, Client). Supports filtering by status, property and date. Requires X-User-ID header.

post.description: Create a new visit request in 'Pending' status. Requires X-User-ID header.

patch.description: Mark a confirmed visit as completed. Only for Agents or Admin. Requires X-User-ID header.
Transition a visit status towards 'Confirmed' by Client or Agent. Requires X-User-ID header.
Cancels the old visit and creates a new one with the new date. Requires X-User-ID header.

delete.description: Soft deletes the authenticated user's local account by marking deleted_at. The Supabase account may still exist, but deleted local users cannot log in through this API.

post.description: Authenticates the user and returns a JWT token.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile data using the Supabase access token to resolve the user identity.

post.description: Verifies the user's email address using the token sent to their email.
